calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-20-2025 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-16-2025 Continued To Jul-16-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Defendant Murphy, Pearson, Bradley And Feeney, P.C.S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Default Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar May-28-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter was set for Prove- Up for a Request for Default Judgment against Defendant James Varga.

Dept:505; Judge: Michelle Tong; Clerk: K.Valdes; Proceedings reported by "For the Record" commencing at 9:34:24 a.m., pausing at 9:43:02 a.m. resuming at 10:18:08 a.m. pausing at 10:20:26 a.m. resuming at 11:37:46 a.m. and concluding at 11:41:15 a.m.(D505)

Geoffrey T. MacBride, Esq. appearing for Plaintiff Murphy, Pearson, Bradley & feeney, P.C.
Defendant James Varga not appearing.
Witness Patrick Wingfield sworn to testify for the Plaintiff.

Counsel to updates on the status of the case, provide a summary and offers proof as to the request for judgment to the court.
Counsel to offer proof as to the statute of limitations.
Counsel examines witness.
Court examines witness. Witness confirms that declarations and statements made are true and correct.
The matter is discusseed.

Good cause appearing, the Court finds that the Plaintiff has proven its prima facie case and rules in favor of the Plaintiff against the Defendant as follows:

Damages $210,180.96
Pre-Judgment Interest at 10% $78,924.65
Attorney's Fees $0
Costs $435.00
Total Judgment $289,540.61

Proposed judgment as amended is signed and executed this day.
